name: Business Brain
description: Strategic context of the operation — vision, brand, pricing, positioning, target users, competitive landscape, principles. The Captain's accumulated thinking, always-on reference for every Officer. Replaces the Notion Business Brain section during Phase 1 cutover.

fields.name: category
fields.description: High-level bucket for navigation. Not enforced — records can shift category as thinking evolves.

fields.name: effective_from
fields.description: When this thinking became current. Older records stay searchable but are informational, not directional.

fields.name: last_reviewed
fields.description: Last time the Captain reviewed or revised. Used to surface stale strategic docs.

fields.name: notion_page_id
fields.description: Original Notion page ID if migrated. Used for idempotent migration and round-trip reference.

fields.name: notion_url
fields.description: Deep link to the original Notion page (if kept as mirror).
